title: Add llms.txt for AI-friendly crawling
notes: New/updated llms.txt at site root with language entry points, key sections, and sitemap.

title: Add llm.txt alias referenced by robots.txt
notes: robots.txt referenced /llm.txt; added llm.txt as an alias (same content as llms.txt) to avoid a broken reference.

title: Keep language switch on matching lesson
notes: Language switcher now links to the matching lesson in other languages using section+weight fallback instead of always sending users to the homepage.

title: Add home hero CTA to start the course
notes: Added localized CTA links in the homepage hero for CA/ES/EN so new visitors can jump straight into the lessons.
